[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Small Business Loan Applications Signals Financial Strain",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for 'small business loan application'",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "An uptick in searches for small business loans indicates rising financial stress among small businesses, often preceding increased credit market activity.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Financial sector ETFs often weaken with increased credit risk signals among small business borrowers."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLF if weekly Google Trends for 'small business loan application' rises by 15%+ WoW",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if the trend falls below a 10% WoW increase",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly Google Trends for financial search terms routinely move 10-20% week-to-week."
  },
